_comment: Canonical player identity aliases. Maps duplicate BDL player IDs to the authoritative canonical_id. Format: { 'duplicate_id': { 'canonical_id': N, 'player_name': '...', 'team_abbreviation': '...', 'effective_from': 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'source': '...', 'resolution_reason': '...' } }

101929.source: BDL API diagnostic 2026-07-14: both player records share same team (POR), jersey (#7), same name. Player 75090 has complete profile (height, age, position=G, 5+ stats rows). Player 101929 has null height/age, sparse record (1 stats row), was created as a duplicate entry.
101929.resolution_reason: Player 75090 is the authoritative record: more complete profile, more historical stats rows, correct position classification. Player 101929 is a sparse BDL duplicate. All rows for 101929 should use canonical_id=75090.

diagnostic.game_crosscheck: Both appear in game_id=24757 with team=POR — same physical player
